conjunctions and aspects. The subject will have no children
or all or most of his children will die. Will this not suffice
to prove that the fifth house is connected with children ?
The ancient Maharishis discovered grand and glorious
truths with the aid of Divya Drishti or introspection.
In applying the rules contained in astrological books to
practical horoscopes one must definitely bear in mind that
they are merely for his guidance. In addition to knowledge
of astrology, one must also exercise discretion and
common-sense coupled of course with a certain amount of
intuition. Significations have been assigned to the various
dignities and debilities of planets, the pros and cons of
which must be carefully considered. No prediction should
be given in a haphazard manner. If the fifth house is well
disposed, and its lord occupies favourable situations the
subject will be happy with regard to children. Suppos-ing
Pisces is Lagna and Jupiter is in Cancer the fifth or
